queries.question: Give me the categories that every magazine has.
queries.sql: SELECT Categories.categoryName  from Magazines_Categories join Categories on Magazines_Categories.categoryId = Categories.id join Magazines on Magazines_Categories.magazineId = Magazines.magazineId   GROUP BY Magazines_Categories.categoryId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Magazines_Categories.magazineId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Magazines)

queries.question: Give me the categories that every magazine has.
queries.sql: select magazines.magazinetitle , categories.categoryname from Magazines_Categories join Categories on Magazines_Categories.categoryId = Categories.id join Magazines on Magazines_Categories.magazineId = Magazines.magazineId
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?magazinetitle ?categoryname WHERE {
  ?magazines_categories a :Magazines_Categories .
  ?categories a :Category .
  ?magazines_categories p:hasCategories ?categories .
  ?magazines a :Magazines .
  ?magazines_categories p:hasMagazines ?magazines .
  ?magazines p:magazineTitle ?magazinetitle .
  ?categories p:categoryName ?categoryname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the categories that every magazine has.
